name: Brain MRI Diffusion (DWI)
description: Brain MRI diffusion-weighted imaging for acute stroke and restricted diffusion detection

findings.technique: Echo planar diffusion-weighted images were obtained in three orthogonal directions with ADC map reconstruction.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Diffusion
sections.content: Diffusion-weighted images demonstrate [no restricted diffusion / no areas of hyperintensity on DWI / no acute infarct].

sections.name: ADC Map
sections.content: ADC map shows [no low signal / no restricted diffusion / no corresponding dark areas].

sections.name: Pattern
sections.content: No territorial infarction pattern identified. No lacunar infarcts seen.

impression:
1. Normal diffusion study.
2. No acute restricted diffusion to suggest acute infarction.
author: RadReport Templates
